sql_array: CREATE TABLE customer_addresses (id INT, address VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO customer_addresses (id, address) VALUES (1, 'Joe Smith, 10045 Berry Lane, San Joseph, CA 91234');
UPDATE customer_addresses SET address = 'Jane Doe, 90210 Beverly Dr, Beverly Hills, CA 90210' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT REGEXP_INSTR(address, '[[:digit:]]{5}') AS first_digit_position FROM customer_addresses;
